sentences.arabic: يُمَثِّلُ الصِّدْقُ رَكِيزَةً أَسَاسِيَّةً فِي بِنَاءِ الْمُجْتَمَعِ الْإِسْلَامِيِّ الْفَاضِلِ، فَهُوَ يَهْدِي إِلَى كُلِّ خَيْرٍ.
sentences.translation: Istinoljubivost predstavlja osnovni oslonac u izgradnji čestitog islamskog društva, jer ona vodi ka svakom dobru.
sentences.translationEn: Truthfulness represents a fundamental pillar in building a virtuous Islamic society, as it leads to all good.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ: «عَلَيْكُمْ بِالصِّدْقِ، فَإِنَّ الصِّدْقَ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْبِرِّ، وَإِنَّ الْبِرَّ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ» [رَوَاهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ الْبِرِّ وَالصِّلَةِ وَالْآدَابِ، رَقْمُ ٢٦٠٧].
sentences.translation: Allahov Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: 'Držite se istine, jer istina vodi ka dobročinstvu, a dobročinstvo vodi u Džennet' [Muslim, Knjiga o dobročinstvu, rodbinskim vezama i adabu, br. 2607].
sentences.translationEn: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Adhere to truthfulness, for truthfulness leads to righteousness, and righteousness leads to Paradise' [Muslim, Book of Virtue, Good Manners and Joining of the Ties of Relationship, No. 2607].

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الْمُسْلِمَ الصَّادِقَ هُوَ مَنْ يَتَحَرَّى الْحَقِيقَةَ فِي أَقْوَالِهِ وَأَفْعَالِهِ، حَتَّى يُكْتَبَ عِنْدَ اللهِ صِدِّيقًا.
sentences.translation: Iskren musliman je onaj koji teži istini u svojim riječima i djelima, sve dok kod Allaha ne bude upisan kao istinoljubiv.
sentences.translationEn: A truthful Muslim is one who seeks the truth in his words and deeds until he is recorded with Allah as a man of truth.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي الْمُقَابِلِ، يُحَذِّرُنَا الدِّينُ مِنَ الْكَذِبِ لِمَا لَهُ مِنْ آثَارٍ تَدْمِيرِيَّةٍ عَلَى الثِّقَةِ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: S druge strane, vjera nas upozorava na laž zbog njenih razornih posljedica na povjerenje među ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: Conversely, religion warns us against lying due to its destructive effects on trust between people.

sentences.arabic: فَالنَّزَاهَةُ فِي الْمُعَامَلَاتِ الْيَوْمِيَّةِ تَعْكِسُ عُمْقَ الْإِيمَانِ وَتُسَاهِمُ فِي نَشْرِ الطُّمَأْنِينَةِ وَالسَّلَامِ.
sentences.translation: Poštenje u svakodnevnim transakcijama odražava dubinu vjere i doprinosi širenju spokoja i mira.
sentences.translationEn: Integrity in daily transactions reflects the depth of faith and contributes to spreading tranquility and peace.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، يَجِبُ عَلَى كُلِّ فَرْدٍ أَنْ يَجْعَلَ الصِّدْقَ شِعَارًا لَهُ فِي السِّرِّ وَالْعَلَنِ.
sentences.translation: Stoga, svaki pojedinac mora učiniti istinu svojim sloganom, kako u tajnosti tako i javno.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, every individual must make truthfulness their motto in private and in public.
